hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams unify KYC, KYB, sanctions, and risk checks into one operational workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports defensible onboarding decisions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding becomes slow with disconnected providers
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to manage customer onboarding when KYC and KYB outputs remain isolated across multiple platforms. This fragmentation increases manual workload, weakens audit trails and complicates consistent risk-based decision-making.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC and KYB provider outputs, sanctions screening, and corporate data into a unified onboarding workflow that streamlines reviews, enforces risk-based routing and preserves audit-ready decision evidence.
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs with sanctions and PEP screening, routing reviews into risk-based cases that lead to structured approval decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented onboarding. One review-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into risk-based workflows, cases, decisions and audit evidence for clearer, provider-neutral onboarding control and compliance review.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured onboarding workflows that preserve evidence, connect provider outputs, and support scalable governance for audit and bank due diligence readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support structured onboarding workflows for compliance teams
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC and KYB checks integrate into onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence-grade audit trails support onboarding reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe risk-based routing and provider orchestration for onboarding
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures onboarding by connecting KYC, KYB, sanctions, and screening provider outputs into workflows, enabling risk-based reviews, case management, and audit trails for compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect KYC and KYB outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYC and KYB provider results, linking identity and company data with risk rules to create connected case workflows for review and decision documentation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding decisions, evidence packages, and review logs to support traceability and support audit readiness across compliance workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates seamlessly with existing KYC, KYB, and screening providers, sitting above them to connect outputs without disrupting current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but connects their outputs into a controlled, explainable, and auditable onboarding workflow.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk checks into controlled onboarding cases and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
